Ralph Lauren Red Label lightweight cotton coach jacket, made of high-density nylon taffeta with a smooth matte finish, excellent wind and water resistance (treated with water repellent), strong wrinkle resistance and easy care, fitting the American casual "durable and practical" positioning. Classic black color, dyed using vat dyeing process (dye penetrates fiber interior), color fastness reaching ISO level 4 or above to prevent fading or bleeding after washing. The lightweight cotton-polyester blend lining reduces friction with inner layers, enhancing smoothness and breathability while maintaining durability, avoiding the stuffy feeling of pure nylon linings. Loose-fitting coach jacket with slightly dropped shoulder line (1-2cm wider than standard fit), hip-length, straight tapered sleeves for freedom of movement and casual style. Left chest logo: flat satin stitch embroidery using 100% polyester high color fastness thread (matching brand standard red color), stitch density of 12-15 stitches per cm, clear logo outline with no rough edges on rider and horse details. Embroidery positioning: accurately positioned using a template (12cm below collar, 8cm from placket) for symmetry and centering. Topstitching: double-needle flat seams (3cm spacing, 10 stitches) at seams with straight, neat stitches in black thread matching fabric color, 0.5cm width for durability and decorative line. Placket and body joint: double-folded placket with flat seam joint, 0.3cm thickness to maintain button shape; placket edges cut with hot knife to prevent fraying. Sleeve attachment: round edge lockstitch machine at sleeve cuff joint with flat seam, natural sleeve curve for comfort, sleeve head height of 8-10cm for relaxed jacket style. Main buttons: black matte finish urea resin buttons with hand-sewn buttonholes (6-cord cotton thread, 8 stitches per mm) for smooth, fray-free edges. Collar button: first button at collar is hidden snap button (12mm diameter) to keep collar neat. Sizes: S-XL.
